rationale: Wuyts et al. (2004) is used in the citing paper's core positioning, not only as a background mention. The authors explicitly invoke it when arguing for a triadic unit of analysis and when claiming their contribution to interfirm research beyond dyadic buyer-supplier views. The citation also appears in the conjoint-design discussion as a methodological precedent, which indicates functional reuse in the study setup.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on Wuyts et al. (2004)'s triadic perspective and extends it to a buying group-buyer-supplier context. It adds new governance mechanisms and moderators (monitoring, community building, and dependence contingencies) and tests these extensions empirically.
